2606.16613.title: CoffeeBench: Benchmarking Long-Horizon LLM Agents in Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Economies
2606.16613.paper_summary: As LLM agents become capable of increasingly long-horizon tasks, evaluating their performance in economic systems is becoming increasingly important. Unlike existing benchmarks that primarily evaluate a single agent interacting with a passive environment, economic systems are inherently multi-agent, requiring autonomous agents to communicate, negotiate, and transact while pursuing their own objectives over extended periods. We introduce CoffeeBench, a benchmark for evaluating LLM agents in a long-horizon multi-agent economy composed of heterogeneous firms. In CoffeeBench, two farmers, two roasters, and two retailers autonomously operate their businesses over a 90-day simulation, each seeking to maximize cumulative net income through communication and transactions while managing cash, inventory, and pricing. The evaluated model controls one coffee roaster, while the remaining firms are controlled by fixed reference agents. Across several recent open-weight and proprietary LLMs, all models outperform a passive baseline that takes no actions, with most achieving positive net income. Analysis of agent behavior reveals substantial differences in long-horizon economic interaction: higher-performing models communicate more actively with other firms, whereas Claude~Haiku~4.5 exhibits an idle-drift failure mode, repeatedly choosing inaction despite producing coherent assessments and plans. We release our code and agent trajectories to support future research.
2606.16613.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLM）代理人能夠執行越來越長期的任務，在經濟系統中評估它們的表現變得越來越重要。與主要評估單一代理人與被動環境互動的現有基準不同，經濟系統本質上是多代理的，要求自主代理人在追求自身目標的同時進行溝通、談判和交易，並持續一段較長的時間。我們介紹了CoffeeBench，這是一個用於評估LLM代理人在由異質企業組成的長期多代理經濟中的基準。在CoffeeBench中，兩位農民、兩位烘焙師和兩位零售商在90天的模擬中自主運營他們的業務，每個人都尋求通過溝通和交易來最大化累積淨收入，同時管理現金、庫存和定價。被評估的模型控制一位咖啡烘焙師，而其餘企業則由固定的參考代理人控制。在幾個最近的開放權重和專有LLM中，所有模型的表現均優於不採取行動的被動基準，大多數模型實現了正的淨收入。對代理人行為的分析顯示，在長期經濟互動中存在顯著差異：表現較好的模型與其他企業的溝通更為積極，而Claude~Haiku~4.5則表現出閒置漂移失效模式，儘管產生了連貫的評估和計劃，但卻反覆選擇不採取行動。我們發布了我們的代碼和代理人軌跡，以支持未來的研究。
2606.16613.author: Issa Sugiura et.al.
2606.16613.authors: Issa Sugiura, Daichi Hattori, Kazuo Araragi, Keita Ogawa, Shota Onose, Taro Makino, Teppei Usuki, Takashi Ishida
